'''vanovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docosadienoate|docosadienoate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docosadienoate|docosadienoate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vanovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:væneveth|væneveth]] || [[word:vænevej|vænevej]] || [[word:vænevesh|vænevesh]] || [[word:væneve|væneve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vanonovoth|vanonovoth]] || [[word:vanonovoj|vanonovoj]] || [[word:vanonovosh|vanonovosh]] || [[word:vanonovo|vanonovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vanovoth|vanovoth]] || [[word:vanovoj|vanovoj]] || [[word:vanovosh|vanovosh]] || [[word:vanovo|vanovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vanofvofth|vanofvofth]] || [[word:vanofvofj|vanofvofj]] || [[word:vanofvofsh|vanofvofsh]] || [[word:vanofvof|vanofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vanovotho|vanovotho]] || [[word:vanovojo|vanovojo]] || [[word:vanovosho|vanovosho]] || [[word:vanovoko|vanovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vanovoth|vanovoth]] || [[word:vanovoj|vanovoj]] || [[word:vanovosh|vanovosh]] || [[word:vanovo|vanovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vanovothol|vanovothol]] || [[word:vanovojol|vanovojol]] || [[word:vanovoshol|vanovoshol]] || [[word:vanovokol|vanovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vanovoothotho|vanovoothotho]] || [[word:vanovoojojo|vanovoojojo]] || [[word:vanovooshosho|vanovooshosho]] || [[word:vanovooko|vanovooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vanovothon|vanovothon]] || [[word:vanovojon|vanovojon]] || [[word:vanovoshon|vanovoshon]] || [[word:vanovokon|vanovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vanovothooro|vanovothooro]] || [[word:vanovojooro|vanovojooro]] || [[word:vanovoshooro|vanovoshooro]] || [[word:vanovokooro|vanovokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
